## Need more advanced automation solutions? Contact us for custom enterprise workflows!

# Growth-AI.fr

## https://www.linkedin.com/in/allanvaccarizi/
## https://www.linkedin.com/in/hugo-marinier-%F0%9F%A7%B2-6537b633/

## Website mapping

### How it works

1. The workflow is triggered when a chat message is received, typically containing a website URL to crawl.
2. Firecrawl maps the website and retrieves all available URLs from it.
3. A conditional check validates whether the Firecrawl response was successful; if not, the workflow stops with an error.
4. On success, a Google Drive template is copied to serve as the destination spreadsheet.
5. A code node sorts and structures the crawled URLs into a tabular format.
6. The processed URL data is written into a Google Sheet via data mapping.

### Setup steps

- - [ ] Configure the **Firecrawl** node with a valid Firecrawl API key and set the target website URL (or map it from the chat message input).
- - [ ] Set up **Google Drive** credentials and specify the template file ID to copy for each run.
- - [ ] Set up **Google Sheets** credentials and configure the destination sheet/range in the **Data mapping** node.
- - [ ] Review the **Sorting URL into table** code node to ensure the URL structuring logic matches your expected output format.
- - [ ] Optionally configure the **Stop and Error** node with a meaningful error message for failed Firecrawl responses.

### Customization

You can adapt the **Sorting URL into table** code node to filter, deduplicate, or categorize URLs before they are written to the sheet. The chat trigger input can also be used to dynamically pass different website URLs per run.

## Trigger and website crawl

Receives a chat message to initiate the workflow, then uses Firecrawl to map a website and retrieve all its URLs.

## Validate response or stop

Checks whether the Firecrawl response was successful. If the check fails, the workflow halts immediately with an error message.

## Structure and save URL data

Copies a Google Drive template, sorts the crawled URLs into a structured table via custom code, then writes the final mapped data into a Google Sheet.
